description: You are a forensic examiner. The district attorney requires the actual files extracted from a suspect's USB drive image (/home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd) with hash verification for chain of custody. Create a forensic case named 'Evidence_Packaging_2024' with case number 'INV-EXT-007'. Identify and extract all regular files—both allocated and deleted, excluding NTFS system metadata files such as $MFT or $Boot—to /home/ga/Reports/extracted_evidence/. Compute MD5 and SHA-256 hashes for each extracted file and record them in a pipe-delimited evidence manifest at /home/ga/Reports/evidence_manifest.txt using the header: ITEM_NO|FILENAME|ORIGINAL_PATH|ALLOC_STATUS|SIZE_BYTES|MD5|SHA256|EXTRACTION_PATH. Finally, generate a summary document at /home/ga/Reports/packaging_summary.txt containing the case name, case number, source image path, source image MD5, total files extracted, counts for allocated and deleted files, total bytes extracted, the extraction directory, and the examiner name 'Forensic Analyst'.
